dto.creator: vosinnii
dto.testProcedure:
• Setup the Standard Environment Adult as shown in chapter 2.2
• Set the test lung to C = 50 ml/mBar, Rp = 5
• If not already done, activate TI/Pause-philosophy in Configuration/Modes
• In Configuration/Setups select “Use factory settings” for Adult 1,2 and 3.
• Set Patient group to Adult and Patient Height to 174cm.
• Select Ventilation Mode PCV+
• Start the ventilation
